ideation: This animation sequence will represent the number 7 using the robot's arms.  The robot will mimic writing the number 7 in the air. The left arm will start in a neutral position, then form the top part of the 7. The right arm will then form the bottom part of the 7, before both arms return to neutral.  The animation will be stylized and expressive, not a literal representation of writing.

frames.beat: arms hang at sides, ready to draw
left arm draws the top horizontal stroke
right arm sweeps down to form the diagonal
both arms return to rest, the number is complete
